name: @wcc-impact/plugin-sdk
description: The ONLY package module UIs may import (plus React). defineModule, useSignals/SignalProvider (one shared realtime subscription), useUser/SignIn, SignalMap, SignalFeed/SignalCard, FileUpload/FileGallery/uploadFile, and re-exported @wcc-impact/shared types + design tokens. See docs/CONTRACTS.md §6.
